headline: Which S&P500 stocks are moving before the opening bell on Monday?
summary: Wondering what's happening in today's pre-market session? Stay tuned for the latest updates on S&P500 stock movements.

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock to Own for Decades and 2 Facing Challenges
summary: A company that generates cash isn’t automatically a winner. Some businesses stockpile cash but fail to reinvest wisely, limiting their ability to expand.
